data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a status timeline per conversion push.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the status timeline per conversion push, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or retrieval of such a timeline. The prior steps focus on booking and customer interactions but do not address the specific need for a status timeline related to conversion pushes. This indicates a gap in the current implementation regarding the requirement.
gaps: Missing evidence of a status timeline per conversion push.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
